name: One-Pan Garlic Butter Shrimp Pasta
description: A quick and flavorful garlic butter shrimp pasta that comes together in about twenty minutes.
keywords: shrimp, pasta, garlic butter, one-pan, quick meal

recipeInstructions.text: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine until al dente.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 1

recipeInstructions.text: Pat the shrimp dry and season them with salt and pepper.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 2

recipeInstructions.text: Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat, then add the garlic and cook until fragrant.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 3

recipeInstructions.text: Add the shrimp and cook for about two minutes per side until they turn pink.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 4

recipeInstructions.text: Pour in the white wine and lemon juice, and let it reduce for a minute.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 5

recipeInstructions.text: Add the cooked pasta straight into the skillet with a splash of pasta water.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 6

recipeInstructions.text: Finish with parmesan, fresh parsley, and a pinch of red pepper flakes. Serve immediately.
recipeInstructions.name: Step 7
